# Campaign Brief

Product: Cloud cost optimization platform
Market: FinOps and cloud infrastructure teams
Locale: US
Geographies: United States, Canada
Industries: SaaS, Financial services
Keywords: cloud cost optimization software, cloud spend allocation, FinOps platform
Intent signals: reduce cloud spend, cloud cost visibility
Technographics: AWS, Azure
Pains: unpredictable cloud bills
Gains: lower infrastructure spend
Objections: migration complexity
Triggers: annual cloud budget planning
Campaign goal: trial signups
Budget: $15,000
Conversion event: Trial signup
Preferred channels: google-ads-youtube, microsoft-ads
